name: German Layered Apple Cake
recipeIngredient: 6 cups Apples; peeled, cored, and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease lightly a 13x9 pan.
3. Layer half of the apples evenly in the pan.
4. In a large bowl, mix dry cake mix, cinnamon, water, butter, and eggs on low until smooth.
5. Beat for 2 minutes at high speed.
6. Stir in nuts.
7. Pour half of the batter evenly over the apples.
8. Repeat layers with remaining batter.
9. Bake for 40-50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Cool in the pan.
11. For frosting, blend all ingredients together until smooth.
12. Frost the top of the cake and enjoy! Serves 12.
